text.title: Serverless Cost Optimization Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-serverless-cost-optimization.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: report_id pattern violation; empty functions / actions; negative cost; saving_pct out of [0,100]; break_even_rps < 1; review_trigger empty; version + date malformed.
